# Do you know what your visitors are thinking?

## Metadata
- **From:** "Jolissa @ MonsterInsights" <support@monsterinsights.com>
- **Date:** 2024-10-08 06:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 191

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Have you ever wished you could ask your website visitors what
they really think?

Now, you can.

With this new tool by MonsterInsights, you can easily collect
feedback from your website visitors about your site's design,
products, content, or whatever you want to learn about.

Meet UserFeedback 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..fTTumMqliar3mHNFoDkD5ZfARSvAxRLTE17t5-vhpcA )
!

UserFeedback is a simple feature-packed tool from the
MonsterInsights team that you can use to learn what your website
visitors are really thinking.

In a few simple steps, you can set up a feedback tab that'll
appear on your whole site, just a specific page, or anywhere. Ask
any question you can think of!

Once you know what your visitors are thinking, you can make the
website improvements that are going to have maximum impact.

Get started with UserFeedback today! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..fTTumMqliar3mHNFoDkD5ZfARSvAxRLTE17t5-vhpcA )


If you have questions about UserFeedback, just reply to this
email.

Until next time,

Jolissa Skow
MonsterInsights Product Educator

Have questions? Send us a message. 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..GnJeFpnSLZKqrTYxILl8L59t4jgi1vSj7tgnOixlrjo )
